org.arakhne.neteditor.io.graphml

Interface GraphMLConstants

  • All Superinterfaces:
    XMLConstants
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractGraphMLReader, GraphMLReader, GraphMLReader1, GraphMLReader2, GraphMLWriter

    public interface GraphMLConstants
extends XMLConstants
    Constants for the GraphML tools.

    GraphML is a comprehensive and easy-to-use file format for graphs. It consists of a language core to describe the structural properties of a graph and a flexible extension mechanism to add application-specific data.

    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    "http://graphml.graphdrawing.org/"
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io
